expr.description: GLSL expression; reference inputs as {name} placeholders

inputs.description: Named input columns referenced in expr as {name}

filter.description: Filter column — registers a filter axis (null for none)

dataLength.description: Override output length (optional, auto-detected from column refs)

transforms.description: Named data transforms applied before layers. Each item is a { name, transform: { ClassName: params } } object.

xAxis.description: Which x-axis to use for this layer

yAxis.description: Which y-axis to use for this layer

zAxis.description: Which z-axis to use for this layer (enables 3D mode)

selection.description: Selection channel name. Layers sharing the same name and data object are linked.

xAxis.description: Which x-axis to use for this layer

yAxis.description: Which y-axis to use for this layer

zAxis.description: Which z-axis to use for this layer (enables 3D mode)

lineColorMode.description: Color mode for lines: gradient interpolates vData linearly; midpoint uses each endpoint's color up to the segment center

lineWidth.description: Line width in pixels (note: browsers may clamp values above 1)

selection.description: Selection channel name. Layers sharing the same name and data object are linked.

colorAxis.description: Quantity kind of the color axis to display

colorbars.description: Floating colorbar widgets. Use xAxis+yAxis for 2D, one axis for 1D.

colorscale.description: Colorscale override. A 2D colorscale name enables the true-2D path.

interactions.description: Interactive behaviours. All share the same data-point selection mechanism.

lasso.description: Lasso selection. true = one lasso per selection name found in layers, trigger=shift. Array = explicit list.

selection.description: Selection channel name matching the layer's selection field.
